tasks.subject: Task 1: Track struct extension + ParseCue multi-FILE
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend Track with Size/Filename/MD5/SHA1/SHA256. ParseCue handles FILE lines, attaches Filename to subsequent Tracks, rejects non-BINARY FILEs, rejects path traversal, rejects multi-track-per-FILE.

**Files:**
- Modify: cue.go, cue_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Track struct has 5 new fields with snake_case JSON tags.
- [ ] ParseCue handles 28-track HL1 shape correctly.
- [ ] Single-FILE cues continue to work.
- [ ] WAVE / path-traversal / multi-track-per-FILE all rejected.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run TestParseCue -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cue.go", "cue_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run TestParseCue -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Track 5 new fields", "28-track HL1 shape", "Single-FILE works", "WAVE rejected", "path traversal rejected", "multi-track-per-FILE rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ResolveCue + OpenBinStream + hashReader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ResolveCue (parse + stat + cumulative LBAs), OpenBinStream (io.MultiReader + close-all), and extract hashReader from hashFile.

**Files:**
- Modify: cue.go, pack.go, cue_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ResolveCue computes correct cumulative FirstLBAs across 3-FILE cue.
- [ ] OpenBinStream concatenates correctly; Close closes all files.
- [ ] hashReader matches hashFile output.
- [ ] hashFile is a thin wrapper around hashReader.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -run "TestResolveCue|TestOpenBinStream|TestHashReader|TestHashFile" -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cue.go", "pack.go", "cue_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -run \"TestResolveCue|TestOpenBinStream|TestHashReader|TestHashFile\" -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cumulative LBAs", "concat + close-all", "hashReader match", "hashFile wraps"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Manifest v0.4 bump + Pack rework with single hashing pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** containerVersion 0x04, FormatVersion 4, v0.3→v0.4 message. PackOptions drops BinPath. Pack uses ResolveCue + single hashing pass with per-track + roll-up fan-out + multi-bin reader.

**Files:**
- Modify: manifest.go, pack.go, pack_test.go, inspect_test.go, manifest_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 6+ hash fields populated (per-track + roll-up); single-FILE: per-track == roll-up.
- [ ] v0.3 rejection.
- [ ] Build over multi-bin works.
- [ ] go test ./... pack tests pass.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "pack.go", "pack_test.go", "inspect_test.go", "manifest_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-track + roll-up", "single-FILE invariant", "v0.3 rejection", "multi-bin build", "pack tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Unpack + Verify rework with per-track verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** UnpackOptions and VerifyOptions drop BinPath. Unpack derives bin sources from manifest in container's directory; stat-checks sizes; single hashing pass per-track + roll-up; rebuild via OpenBinStream.

**Files:**
- Modify: unpack.go, verify.go, unpack_test.go, verify_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Round-trip byte-equal.
- [ ] Per-track + roll-up hash tampering caught (errBinHashMismatch).
- [ ] Track size mismatch caught.
- [ ] Verify analog matrix passes.
- [ ] go test ./... PASS, go vet clean.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -v && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["unpack.go", "verify.go", "unpack_test.go", "verify_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -v && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip byte-equal", "per-track tamper", "size mismatch", "verify matrix", "go test clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CLI single-positional rewrite + discover.go deletion + inspect display
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite runPack/runUnpack/runVerify for single positional. Drop cwd-discovery. Delete discover.go. Update help texts. Update inspect.go to display per-track entries.

**Files:**
- Modify: main.go, help.go, inspect.go, inspect_test.go, main_test.go, e2e_redump_test.go
- Delete: discover.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] One positional per subcommand; zero/multi → exit 1.
- [ ] Default output from input stem.
- [ ] inspect shows per-track filename/size/hashes.
- [ ] discover.go gone; nothing references it.
- [ ] go test ./... PASS, go vet clean, go build works.

**Verify:** `go test ./... -v && go vet ./... && go build -o /tmp/miniscram-b15-smoke ./... && rm /tmp/miniscram-b15-smoke`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["main.go", "help.go", "inspect.go", "inspect_test.go", "main_test.go", "e2e_redump_test.go", "discover.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./... -v && go vet ./... && go build -o /tmp/miniscram-b15-smoke ./... && rm /tmp/miniscram-b15-smoke", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single positional", "default output from stem", "inspect per-track", "discover.go deleted", "go test clean", "build works"]}
```
